ENTRY.C_GL: var cash=DV.getCurrentDoData('MUL_CASH_IND');DV.writeLog("cash=="+cash); if (cash == 'Yes'){ var country = DV.getCountryCode(); var currency=DV.getCurrentDoData('SETT_CCY'); var sql = "item_c='006' and cnty_code='" + country + "' and item_name='" + currency + "'" ; DV.SYS_getTableData('FIELD_1_X','eximtrx.data_master',sql); DV.writeLog("sql=="+sql);} else { var acc; acc = DV.getCurrentDoData('CPYT_DR_AC'); DV.writeLog("acc=="+acc); DV.appendField(acc); }
ENTRY.C_INTEREST_RATE1: var ccy1 = DV.getCurrentDoData('SETT_CCY'); var ccy2 = DV.getCurrentDoData('PAY_CCY'); var baseCCY = DV.SYS_LCY; var rate = '123456789'; var defaultRate = '1'; var cnty = DV.getCountryCode(); /*if (ccy1.equals(baseCCY) || ccy2.equals(baseCCY) ){ var covNo = DV.getCurrentDoData('COV_NO'); if (covNo != null){ DV.appendField(rate); }else{ if(ccy1 != baseCCY){ sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='Booking Rate' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }else{ DV.appendField(defaultRate); } } }else{ if(ccy1 != baseCCY){ sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='Booking Rate' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }else{ DV.appendField(defaultRate); } } */ if (ccy1.equals(baseCCY) || ccy2.equals(baseCCY) ){ DV.appendField(rate); }else{ sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='Booking Rate' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }

var ccy1 = DV.getCurrentDoData('PAY_CCY'); var ccy2 = DV.getCurrentDoData('SETT_CCY'); var baseCCY = DV.SYS_LCY; var rate = '123456789'; var defaultRate = '1'; var cnty = DV.getCountryCode(); /*if (ccy1.equals(baseCCY) || ccy2.equals(baseCCY) ){ var covNo = DV.getCurrentDoData('COV_NO'); if (covNo != null){ DV.appendField(rate); }else{ if(ccy1 != baseCCY){ sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='Booking Rate' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }else{ DV.appendField(defaultRate); } } }else{ if(ccy1 != baseCCY){ sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='Booking Rate' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }else{ DV.appendField(defaultRate); } }*/ if (ccy1.equals(baseCCY) || ccy2.equals(baseCCY) ){ DV.appendField(rate); }else{ sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='Booking Rate' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }
ENTRY.C_VCH_SPECIAL1: var acc=DV.getFieldValue('CPYT_CR_BK_AC'); var sql="C_ACCT_WITH_ID = C_MAIN_REF AND C_ACCT_NR='" + acc + "'"; DV.SYS_getTableData('PARTY_NM','eximsys.std_clearing, eximtrx.bank_master',sql);

ENTRY.C_INTEREST_RATE1: /*var ccy1 = DV.getFieldValue("X103_SETT_CCY_32A"); var baseCCY = DV.SYS_LCY; var defaultRate = '1'; var cnty = DV.getCountryCode(); DV.writeLog("coming 13"+ccy1); DV.writeLog("coming 13"+DV.getFieldValue("X103_SENDCHGAMT71F")); if(ccy1 != baseCCY){ DV.writeLog("coming 13"); sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='Booking Rate' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }else{ DV.writeLog("coming 14"); DV.appendField(defaultRate); } */ DV.appendField('123456789');
ENTRY.C_VCH_SPECIAL1: var acc=DV.getFieldValue('CPYT_CR_BK_AC'); var sql="C_ACCT_WITH_ID = C_MAIN_REF AND C_ACCT_NR='" + acc + "'"; DV.SYS_getTableData('PARTY_NM','eximsys.std_clearing, eximtrx.bank_master',sql);

ENTRY.C_INTEREST_RATE1: var ccy1 = DV.getFieldValue("X103_SETT_CCY_32A"); var baseCCY = DV.SYS_LCY; var defaultRate = '1'; var cnty = DV.getCountryCode(); if(ccy1 != baseCCY){ DV.writeLog("coming 23"); sql = "C_FROM_CCY = '"+ ccy1 +"' AND C_TO_CCY='"+baseCCY+"' and C_BK_GROUP_ID='STBANK' and C_CNTY_CODE='"+cnty+"' and C_DESC_ID='TT Selling' "; DV.SYS_getTableData('F_VALUE','EXIMSYS.STD_EXCHAN_RATE',sql); }else{ DV.writeLog("coming 24"); DV.appendField(defaultRate); }
ENTRY.C_VCH_SPECIAL1: var acc=DV.getFieldValue('CPYT_CR_BK_AC'); var sql="C_ACCT_WITH_ID = C_MAIN_REF AND C_ACCT_NR='" + acc + "'"; DV.SYS_getTableData('PARTY_NM','eximsys.std_clearing, eximtrx.bank_master',sql);
